# Browse Skill — LLM Reference

Playwright-backed HTTP daemon. Browser stays alive between commands — auth, cookies, localStorage persist across the full session.
State file: `~/.claude/skills/browse/.state.json` (port + token)
Screenshots: `~/.claude/skills/browse/.screenshots/`

## Triggers — use /browse when

- Testing or verifying a live URL, localhost app, or staging environment
- Checking how UI looks in the browser (screenshot first, then inspect)
- Navigating authenticated flows (login, checkout, protected pages)
- Checking console errors or network failures on a running app
- Any task that says "verify", "check", "test", "QA" against a real URL

Never cold-start Playwright directly — always use this daemon.

## Auto-start (run before every command)

```bash
SKILL_DIR="$HOME/.claude/skills/browse"
STATE="$SKILL_DIR/.state.json"
if [ -f "$STATE" ]; then
  PORT=$(node -e "console.log(require('$STATE').port)")
  ALIVE=$(curl -s --max-time 1 http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health | grep -c '"ok":true' || echo 0)
else
  ALIVE=0
fi
if [ "$ALIVE" = "0" ]; then
  ~/.bun/bin/bun run "$SKILL_DIR/server.ts" > "$SKILL_DIR/.daemon.log" 2>&1 &
  for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do sleep 1; [ -f "$STATE" ] && break; done
fi
```

## Calling commands

```bash
STATE=$(cat ~/.claude/skills/browse/.state.json)
PORT=$(echo $STATE | node -e "process.stdin.resume();let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>console.log(JSON.parse(d).port))")
TOKEN=$(echo $STATE | node -e "process.stdin.resume();let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>console.log(JSON.parse(d).token))")

# Single
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/command \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"command": "go localhost:3000"}'

# Batch (prefer — fewer tool calls)
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/command \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"commands": ["go localhost:3000", "screenshot", "console-errors"]}'
```

## All commands

### Navigation
| `go <url>` | navigate (waits networkidle) |
| `reload` | reload page |
| `back` / `forward` | browser history |

### Interaction
| `click <selector>` | click element |
| `fill <selector> <value>` | fill input |
| `select <selector> <value>` | select dropdown |
| `hover <selector>` | hover |
| `key <key>` | press key (Enter, Tab, Escape, ArrowDown…) |
| `scroll <selector\|top\|bottom>` | scroll |

### Reading
| `screenshot` | viewport PNG → Read tool to display |
| `screenshot:full` | full-page PNG |
| `text` | all visible text |
| `html [selector]` | HTML (capped 5000 chars) |
| `console-errors` | flush buffered console errors/warnings |
| `network-errors` | flush buffered 4xx/5xx + failed requests |

### Inspection
| `exists <selector>` | element presence |
| `visible <selector>` | element visibility |
| `value <selector>` | input value |
| `attr <selector> <attr>` | attribute value |
| `count <selector>` | count matches |
| `status` | current URL, title, contexts, tabs |

### Viewport & tabs
| `viewport <w> <h>` | set viewport |
| `new-tab [url]` / `switch-tab <i>` / `close-tab` / `tabs` | tab management |

### Multi-context (isolated cookies/auth per context)
| `ctx:create [name]` | create isolated context |
| `ctx:switch <name>` | switch active context |
| `ctx:list` | list all contexts |
| `ctx:destroy <name>` | destroy context (not default) |

## Response shape

```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "screenshot": "/path/to/file.png",
  "page": { "url": "...", "title": "..." },
  "new_console_errors": [{ "type": "error", "text": "...", "ts": 0 }],
  "new_network_errors": [{ "url": "...", "status": 404, "method": "GET", "ts": 0 }],
  "interactive": { "inputs": 3, "buttons": 5, "links": 12, "forms": 1 }
}
```

Use Read tool with returned screenshot path to display inline.

## Common patterns

```json
// Page load check
{"commands": ["go localhost:3000", "console-errors", "screenshot"]}

// Auth flow
{"commands": ["go localhost:3000/login", "fill [name=email] test@x.com", "fill [name=password] pw", "click [type=submit]", "screenshot"]}

// Responsive check
{"commands": ["go localhost:3000", "screenshot", "viewport 375 812", "screenshot"]}

// Two auth states
ctx:create admin → login as admin
ctx:create user  → login as user
ctx:switch admin → go /admin-panel  (should 200)
ctx:switch user  → go /admin-panel  (should 403)
```

## Setup (one-time)
```bash
cd ~/.claude/skills/browse && bun install && bun run install-browsers
```

## Notes
- `go`, `reload`, `back`, `forward` wait for networkidle
- `click`, `key` wait up to 3s for networkidle then continue
- Daemon auto-shuts after 30min idle; restart anytime
- Crash → check `.daemon.log`, restart daemon
